# Boyer & Harrington (2018) J. Hum. Evol: # Taxa with directly measured whole-Brain Glucose Utilization (BGU)
# arterial canal area (ACA) and endocranial volume (ECV); used by the authors to
# calibrate the prediction of BGU from ACA and ECV.
#   BGU_umol_min : whole-brain glucose utilization. Printed in the paper as
#                  used in s4). Treated here as umol/min so units match s4 budgets.
#   ACA_mm2      : total arterial canal area (doubled transverse-foramen + doubled
#                  may differ from the Table 1 species-mean ECV).
#   Neuron_count : total brain neurons (Herculano-Houzel et al. 2015).
# BGU data transcribed by Boyer & Harrington from Karbowski (2007).
